runTitle: Playwright MCP Production QA - v8.11.0 analysis basis sanitization + agent label fix

expertAssessments.rationale: Analysis basis panel verified post-sanitization: (1) tool function names replaced with Korean labels ('메트릭 상관 분석' not 'correlateMetrics'), (2) response body shows 3-section format (현황 요약/추정 원인/권장 조치) with no internal function names, (3) collapsed summary shows '분석 단계:' label not '도구:', (4) raw JSON preview block removed, (5) agent role labels use Korean mapping, (6) alert prefill populated correctly, (7) 0 console errors.

usageChecks.summary: Reusing QA-20260408-0251 billing check: effective 3.9429 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, no unexpected spike.

artifacts.label: AI response with 3-section format and sanitized analysis basis panel

completedImprovements.title: 분석 근거 패널 내부 구현 정보 노출 제거
멀티 에이전트 경로 tool_result 이벤트 누락 수정

notes: Deployed via `vercel --prod` (source upload) after GitLab CI quota exceeded and local `vercel build --prod` failed due to WSL2 network issue with fonts.gstatic.com
Single-agent path verified; multi-agent orchestrator path requires complex query to trigger
